lines.text: 松影斑驳的山道旁，木桑道人背着棋盘，笑意满面。
lines.textEn: Along the dappled pine path, Taoist Musang carries a Go board with a warm smile.

lines.speaker: 木桑道人
lines.text: 小友，棋盘随身，世上便不怕无弈友。
lines.textEn: Young friend, with a Go board at hand, one never fears the lack of opponents.

lines.speaker: 你
lines.text: 道长好兴致。听说你有一盘名局？
lines.textEn: Master, you seem in fine spirits. I heard you have a famed game?

lines.speaker: 木桑道人
lines.text: 人称“千变万劫”。棋势如江海，牵一子动全局。
lines.textEn: They call it “Infinite Variations.” A board flows like rivers and seas—move one stone, and the whole game shifts.

lines.text: 他一面布子，一面说起山中清修与棋道相通之理。
lines.textEn: As he lays stones, he speaks of how mountain cultivation mirrors the Way of Go.

lines.speaker: 木桑道人
lines.text: 武学讲究气脉，棋局讲究气口。都要看远、算深。
lines.textEn: Martial arts focus on meridians; Go focuses on liberties. Both require long sight and deep calculation.

lines.speaker: 你
lines.text: 若是心乱，棋也乱。
lines.textEn: If the mind is in chaos, the board follows.

lines.speaker: 木桑道人
lines.text: 说得好。棋有生死，亦有取舍。
lines.textEn: Well said. Go has life and death, and the art of letting go.

lines.text: 他忽然把一颗黑子按在险处，像是试探命运。
lines.textEn: He presses a black stone into a perilous spot, as if testing fate.

lines.speaker: 木桑道人
lines.text: 老道不久要远行，此局便当一卦。
lines.textEn: I must soon travel far. Let this game be a divination.

lines.speaker: 你
lines.text: 远行之事，可愿详说？
lines.textEn: Would you share more about this journey?

lines.speaker: 木桑道人
lines.text: 为一件师门遗物。先机一失，便再难追。
lines.textEn: For a relic of my lineage. Lose the first move, and it is hard to recover.

lines.text: 烛影摇曳，他的脸在光影中忽明忽暗。
lines.textEn: Candlelight flickers, his face shifting between light and shadow.

lines.speaker: 木桑道人
lines.text: 这片黑子，就像我此行，步步凶险。
lines.textEn: This black group is like my journey—danger at every step.

lines.speaker: 你
lines.text: 可否先稳住一隅，再图他处？
lines.textEn: Could you secure a corner first, then seek elsewhere?

lines.speaker: 木桑道人
lines.text: 嗯……退一步，未必是退。
lines.textEn: Hmm… one step back is not always retreat.

lines.text: 你转身在远角落子，腾出眼位。
lines.textEn: You turn and play in a far corner, creating an eye.

lines.speaker: 木桑道人
lines.text: 妙着！此局可活。
lines.textEn: A brilliant move! This game can live.

lines.speaker: 你
lines.text: 胜负之外，只求心安。
lines.textEn: Beyond winning or losing, I seek only peace of mind.

lines.speaker: 木桑道人
lines.text: 老道自吹也好，今日却是真的开心。
lines.textEn: Call it boastful if you like, but today I am truly happy.

lines.text: 他把棋子收好，神色轻快了许多。
lines.textEn: He gathers the stones, his expression much lighter.

lines.speaker: 木桑道人
lines.text: 这份棋谱赠你，记下今日心境。
lines.textEn: This Go record is for you—keep today’s mood in your heart.

items.name: 棋道手札
items.description: 记录木桑道人心得，阅读后获得围棋灵感。
items.descriptionEn: Notes of Taoist Musang; reading grants Go inspiration.

items.name: 山行护符
items.description: 山中求安的护身符，小幅提升体力恢复。
items.descriptionEn: A talisman for mountain travel; slightly boosts stamina regen.

items.name: 松针清茶
items.description: 山中清茶，饮用后恢复少量内力。
items.descriptionEn: A mountain tea that restores a little inner power.

lines.text: 万劫谷石屋内，石屑纷飞，一张十九道棋盘在青石上刻成。
lines.textEn: Inside the stone house of Wanjie Valley, a 19-line board is carved into blue rock as stone chips fly.

lines.speaker: 黄眉僧
lines.text: 段施主，棋局定胜负，可敢一局？
lines.textEn: Benefactor Duan, shall we let the board decide victory?

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 金刚指力，好功夫！
lines.textEn: Diamond Finger power—fine skill!

lines.text: 铁杖与木槌在石上留下深痕，黑白势子落定。
lines.textEn: Iron staff and wooden mallet leave deep marks as black and white positions are set.

lines.speaker: 黄眉僧
lines.text: 施主功力深厚，老僧不敢逞强，还望让上几子。
lines.textEn: Your power runs deep. I dare not boast—allow me a few handicap stones.

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 棋上要分胜负，便当平下。
lines.textEn: If we seek a true result, we play even.

lines.speaker: 黄眉僧
lines.text: 四子如何？三子也可。
lines.textEn: Four stones? Three will do.

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 既自认不及，何必再局？最多让一先。
lines.textEn: If you admit inferiority, why play? At most, take the first move.

lines.speaker: 黄眉僧
lines.text: 哈哈，原来施主棋力也不过如此，不妨我让你三子。
lines.textEn: Ha! So your Go is only so-so. Then I will give you three stones.

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 不必相让，分先对弈。
lines.textEn: No need. Let us play for first move.

lines.text: 黄眉僧心下愈发忌惮，暗知此人不骄不躁，难以激怒。
lines.textEn: Huangmei grows wary; he senses this man is calm and hard to provoke.

lines.speaker: 黄眉僧
lines.text: 先后之争，便赌一线气运。
lines.textEn: For the first move, let us wager a thread of fate.

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 你想争先手，便使出你的本事。
lines.textEn: If you want the first move, show your skill.

lines.speaker: 黄眉僧
lines.text: 先手关乎生死，施主可敢一赌？
lines.textEn: The first move decides life or death. Do you dare?

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 赌什么？
lines.textEn: What is the wager?

lines.speaker: 黄眉僧
lines.text: 猜我年过七十时，足趾是奇是偶。
lines.textEn: Guess: when I am over seventy, will my toes be odd or even?

lines.text: 段延庆暗自思量，仍答“偶”。
lines.textEn: Duan Yanqing thinks and answers, “Even.”

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 偶数。
lines.textEn: Even.

lines.text: 黄眉僧笑而不语，除靴验足，竟两足完好无缺。
lines.textEn: Huangmei smiles silently, removes his shoes—both feet are intact.

lines.text: 他忽提小铁槌，断下一趾，血珠溅在石面。
lines.textEn: He lifts a small iron hammer and severs a toe, blood splashing on stone.

lines.speaker: 黄眉僧
lines.text: 今我六十九，待七十，足趾成奇。
lines.textEn: I am sixty-nine. When I reach seventy, the count will be odd.

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 好。先手归你。
lines.textEn: Fine. The first move is yours.

lines.text: 先手既定，局势更添肃杀。
lines.textEn: With first move decided, the air grows even more tense.

lines.speaker: 黄眉僧
lines.text: 今日一子之先，关乎万民命数。
lines.textEn: A single move today may decide countless lives.

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 命数？我只信胜负。
lines.textEn: Fate? I only believe in victory.

lines.text: 棋势如剑，针锋相对。
lines.textEn: The board sharpens like a sword—edge to edge.

lines.text: 棋局中盘，黑子突变，白势摇摇欲坠。
lines.textEn: Midgame shifts: black transforms, white’s position trembles.

lines.speaker: 段誉
lines.text: （低声）这一手若不变，怕要失先。
lines.textEn: (low) If this isn’t changed, we may lose the initiative.

lines.speaker: 黄眉僧
lines.text: 施主既有见，老僧愿从。
lines.textEn: If you see a way, I will follow.

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 旁观不语才像君子，多管闲事才是真胆。
lines.textEn: A gentleman watches in silence. Meddling is the true boldness.

lines.speaker: 段誉
lines.text: 你困我在此，我又怎能沉默？
lines.textEn: You trapped me here—how could I stay silent?

lines.text: 破嗔在背上写下七手，白子一度转危为安。
lines.textEn: He writes seven moves on his back; white briefly turns danger into safety.

lines.speaker: 黄眉僧
lines.text: 棋在心中，气在指上。
lines.textEn: The board is in the heart; the power is at the fingertips.

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 好招。可惜，你终要露出破绽。
lines.textEn: A fine move. Pity—you will still reveal a flaw.

lines.text: 黑子忽然弃势夺要，白棋一时难解。
lines.textEn: Black suddenly yields influence to seize the key point; white struggles to respond.

lines.speaker: 段誉
lines.text: 若换此手，可借劫转势。
lines.textEn: If we change to this move, a ko can turn the tide.

lines.speaker: 黄眉僧
lines.text: 老僧再赌一线。
lines.textEn: Then I wager another thread.

lines.text: 铁杖失势，一子成了败笔，段延庆怒碎棋盘。
lines.textEn: The iron staff loses shape; one move becomes the blunder. Duan Yanqing smashes the board in rage.

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 此局不算完，天机终会翻转。
lines.textEn: This game is not over. Heaven will yet turn.

items.name: 禅定香囊
items.description: 佛门静心之物，小幅提升内力恢复。
items.descriptionEn: A calming Buddhist sachet; slightly boosts inner power regen.

items.name: 铁杖印记
items.description: 暗示段延庆记下你的援手，战斗银两奖励略增。
items.descriptionEn: A mark of favor; battle silver rewards slightly increase.

lines.text: 后院，一面墙竟刻成棋盘，棋子嵌入石道。
lines.textEn: In the back courtyard, a wall is carved into a Go board, stones embedded in stone grooves.

lines.speaker: 陈家洛
lines.text: 此局不用手落子，用腕与劲。
lines.textEn: In this game, you place stones not with your hand but with wrist and force.

lines.speaker: 你
lines.text: 把棋子当暗器？
lines.textEn: You use stones as hidden weapons?

lines.speaker: 陈家洛
lines.text: 棋为器，心为势。若势先到，子自会中。
lines.textEn: The stone is a tool; the mind is the momentum. If the momentum arrives first, the stone will land true.

lines.text: 黑子飞出，嵌入棋道，劲风卷起尘屑。
lines.textEn: A black stone flies, embedding into the groove as a gust whips dust.

lines.speaker: 庄客
lines.text: 好准的手劲！
lines.textEn: What precise force!

lines.speaker: 陈家洛
lines.text: 准不准，要看对手如何守。
lines.textEn: Precision depends on how the opponent defends.

lines.speaker: 你
lines.text: 棋局若失先机，如何补救？
lines.textEn: If you lose the initiative, how do you recover?

lines.speaker: 陈家洛
lines.text: 破阵不靠守，靠变。
lines.textEn: Breaking a formation is not defense—it is change.

lines.text: 白子一投，略偏半寸，局势忽然倒转。
lines.textEn: A white stone is thrown half an inch off, and the position suddenly flips.

lines.speaker: 陈家洛
lines.text: 你看，棋子偏了，便是破绽。
lines.textEn: See? A stone that drifts is a flaw.

lines.speaker: 你
lines.text: 所以要稳住心手。
lines.textEn: So the mind and hand must be steady.

lines.speaker: 陈家洛
lines.text: 也要敢于乱。乱中求胜，才是暗器之道。
lines.textEn: You must also dare to be chaotic. Winning amid disorder is the way of hidden weapons.

lines.text: 他示范将一颗黑子打歪，落在意想不到的点位。
lines.textEn: He demonstrates by skewing a black stone to land on an unexpected point.

lines.speaker: 陈家洛
lines.text: 此招名为棋子暗器，扰乱对手心神。
lines.textEn: This technique is called Stone-as-Weapon, unsettling the opponent’s mind.

lines.speaker: 你
lines.text: 乱中不失其道，才是真本事。
lines.textEn: To keep your way within chaos—that is real skill.

lines.text: 他收手一笑，将一小袋石子递到你手里。
lines.textEn: He smiles and hands you a small pouch of stones.

items.name: 定手石
items.description: 练习手腕稳定的石子，提升暗器命中率，可将棋子暗器技能提升一个等级。
items.descriptionEn: A stone for steadying the wrist; improves accuracy and raises the Stone-as-Weapon skill by one level.

items.name: 散势袋
items.description: 乱局之物，使用后减少一次技能冷却。
items.descriptionEn: A tool for chaotic play; reduces one skill cooldown.

lines.text: 昆仑空地上，何足道以剑尖划地，横纵十九道渐成棋盘。
lines.textEn: On the Kunlun sands, He Zudao draws nineteen lines with his sword tip.

lines.speaker: 何足道
lines.text: 琴可入心，剑可入骨，唯棋可入魂。
lines.textEn: The zither enters the heart, the sword enters the bone, but Go enters the soul.

lines.speaker: 你
lines.text: 无人对弈，竟自与己争？
lines.textEn: With no opponent, you contend with yourself?

lines.speaker: 何足道
lines.text: 世上无我之敌，便让心与心为敌。
lines.textEn: If the world has no rival for me, then I set my heart against itself.

lines.text: 黑白两势在左上角缠斗，剑气与风声交织。
lines.textEn: Black and white clash in the upper-left, sword aura mixing with the wind.

lines.speaker: 郭襄
lines.text: 此势若恋中腹，恐要全军覆没。
lines.textEn: If we cling to the center here, we may be wiped out.

lines.speaker: 你
lines.text: 不如弃中取边？
lines.textEn: What if we give up the center for the side?

lines.speaker: 何足道
lines.text: 弃一处，换一局。
lines.textEn: Sacrifice a place, win a whole game.

lines.text: 他大笑数声，转向西侧空地连下两子，势态顿转。
lines.textEn: He laughs and plays two stones on the west, the momentum turning at once.

lines.speaker: 何足道
lines.text: 好！好！局面既破，心境自开。
lines.textEn: Good! Good! Once the position breaks, the mind opens.

lines.speaker: 你
lines.text: 这便是弃子取势。
lines.textEn: This is sacrifice for influence.

lines.speaker: 何足道
lines.text: 世事亦然。
lines.textEn: So it is with all things.

lines.text: 他收剑而立，神色舒朗。
lines.textEn: He sheathes his sword, his expression serene.

items.name: 清弦谱
items.description: 琴谱一页，提升内力恢复效率。
items.descriptionEn: A page of music that boosts inner power recovery.

items.name: 决断符
items.description: 提升一次技能使用上限提示。

lines.text: 梅庄密室里，古谱摊开，黑白子额上微汗。
lines.textEn: In Meizhuang’s secret room, the ancient manual lies open and Hei Baizi’s brow is damp.

lines.speaker: 黑白子
lines.text: 此谱名为《呕血谱》，我思索多年。
lines.textEn: This manual is called the Vomiting Blood Manual. I have pondered it for years.

lines.speaker: 你
lines.text: 何处最难？
lines.textEn: Where is it most difficult?

lines.speaker: 黑白子
lines.text: 第六十七手，断不稳，连不活，冲也冲不出。
lines.textEn: The sixty-seventh move—cutting fails, connecting dies, pushing out is impossible.

lines.text: 他指尖敲在石几上，节奏愈急。
lines.textEn: His fingertips tap the stone table, growing faster.

lines.speaker: 黑白子
lines.text: 若你是我，会如何落子？
lines.textEn: If you were me, how would you play?

lines.speaker: 你
lines.text: 也许要用缓手，让对方自乱。
lines.textEn: Perhaps a slow move, letting the opponent unravel.

lines.speaker: 黑白子
lines.text: 妙，就在此处。
lines.textEn: Brilliant—right there.

lines.text: 他落子于上部要点，局面顿现生机。
lines.textEn: He plays at the upper key point, and life appears in the position.

lines.speaker: 黑白子
lines.text: 好！这一步果然妙。
lines.textEn: Good! This move is indeed wonderful.

lines.speaker: 你
lines.text: 古谱之妙，在于心静。
lines.textEn: The manual’s magic lies in a calm mind.

lines.speaker: 黑白子
lines.text: 心静一分，棋力便进一分。
lines.textEn: Calm the heart by one part, and your Go advances by one part.

lines.text: 他将古谱拓印递给你。
lines.textEn: He hands you a rubbing of the ancient manual.

items.name: 呕血谱拓本
items.description: 一份棋谱拓印，可用于研究任务。
items.descriptionEn: A rubbing of the manual, useful for research quests.

items.name: 静心墨石
items.description: 能让思路更清晰的小道具。
items.descriptionEn: A small tool that clears the mind.

lines.text: 擂鼓山石台前，珍珑棋局布成，黑白势子纠缠成网。
lines.textEn: Before the stone platform of Leigu Mountain, the Zhenlong Puzzle is set—black and white tangled like a net.

lines.speaker: 苏星河
lines.text: 此局高处多，落子须断舍。
lines.textEn: The board is full of heights; one must know when to cut and let go.

lines.speaker: 段誉
lines.text: 我看得见上方生机，却舍不得这一片。
lines.textEn: I see life above, yet I cannot abandon this group.

lines.text: 他连下十余手，处处求稳，局势仍被牵制。
lines.textEn: He plays more than ten moves seeking safety, yet the position remains constrained.

lines.speaker: 段誉
lines.text: 若再弃子，怕一退千里。
lines.textEn: If I sacrifice more, I fear a retreat of a thousand miles.

lines.speaker: 你
lines.text: 惜子过深，反被局势拖住。
lines.textEn: Clinging to stones only lets the position drag you down.

lines.speaker: 苏星河
lines.text: 能见高处已不易，未敢取舍，便难破局。
lines.textEn: Seeing the heights is hard enough. Without courage to sacrifice, the puzzle cannot be solved.

lines.text: 范百龄伏身细算，指尖在棋盘上不停点算。
lines.textEn: Fan Bailing bends low, counting tirelessly with his fingertips.

lines.speaker: 范百龄
lines.text: 这一劫可解，只差一口气……
lines.textEn: This ko can be resolved—just one liberty short…

lines.speaker: 苏星河
lines.text: 局非一隅可解，莫只顾局部。
lines.textEn: The whole cannot be solved by a corner; do not fixate on the local.

lines.text: 他再算数手，胸口发闷，气血翻涌。
lines.textEn: He calculates further, chest tightening, blood surging.

lines.speaker: 范百龄
lines.text: 再想一步，再想一步……
lines.textEn: One more move… one more…

lines.speaker: 丁春秋
lines.text: 强行推演，只会反伤自身。
lines.textEn: Forcing the calculation only harms oneself.

lines.text: 慕容复凝视边角，执意以小胜换大势。
lines.textEn: Murong Fu stares at the corners, insisting on small wins for greater influence.

lines.speaker: 慕容复
lines.text: 边角若得，腹地自开。
lines.textEn: Secure the corners and the center will open itself.

lines.speaker: 你
lines.text: 只取边角，恐腹心空虚。
lines.textEn: If you only take corners, the center may be hollow.

lines.speaker: 慕容复
lines.text: 胜负在此一线，我绝不能失。
lines.textEn: Victory hangs by a thread here. I cannot lose it.

lines.text: 他步步计较得失，心态被胜负牵动，落子愈发急促。
lines.textEn: He counts gains and losses each step, his mind drawn by victory, his moves growing hurried.

lines.text: 鸠摩智绕局而行，目光越过局部，直看大势。
lines.textEn: Jiumozhi circles the board, eyes bypassing the local to view the whole.

lines.speaker: 鸠摩智
lines.text: 此局如江河山岳，格局不小。
lines.textEn: This game is like rivers and mountains—its scale is vast.

lines.speaker: 你
lines.text: 大师不入局？
lines.textEn: Master, you won’t enter the game?

lines.speaker: 鸠摩智
lines.text: 心不在棋，入局反成累赘。
lines.textEn: If the mind is not with the board, entering only becomes a burden.

lines.speaker: 鸠摩智
lines.text: 看大势易，解细处难，何必徒耗心神。
lines.textEn: Seeing the whole is easy; solving the fine points is hard. Why waste the mind?

lines.text: 段延庆以铁杖点子入局，思路强硬，步步逼迫。
lines.textEn: Duan Yanqing enters with an iron staff, his plan forceful, pressuring every step.

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 正道偏不得，偏道亦难成。
lines.textEn: The straight path cannot bend; the crooked path rarely succeeds.

lines.speaker: 丁春秋
lines.text: 由正入邪易，回头难。
lines.textEn: It’s easy to turn crooked from straight, hard to return.

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 棋上只信胜负分明。
lines.textEn: On the board, I only trust clear victory and defeat.

lines.text: 他愈走愈偏，执念成形，局势难以回正。
lines.textEn: He drifts farther and farther off course; obsession takes shape and the game cannot return.

lines.speaker: 虚竹
lines.text: 我不善棋，只愿不负本心。
lines.textEn: I am not good at Go; I only wish to be true to my heart.

lines.text: 他闭目落子，自断一块，局面却豁然开朗。
lines.textEn: He closes his eyes and plays, cutting off his own stones—the position opens wide.

lines.speaker: 苏星河
lines.text: 此着自杀，岂有此理！
lines.textEn: A suicidal move—how can this be!

lines.speaker: 虚竹
lines.text: 我只是随缘一手。
lines.textEn: I only followed fate for a move.

lines.text: 他惶然无措之际，耳畔忽有细声指点方位。
lines.textEn: As he stands helpless, a soft voice guides him.

lines.speaker: 神秘声音
lines.text: 去位、平位、上位皆可破势，落子莫疑。
lines.textEn: Lower, level, or upper—all can break the momentum. Do not hesitate.

lines.text: 虚竹依言落子，局面连转，众人惊叹。
lines.textEn: Xu Zhu obeys, and the position twists repeatedly; all are amazed.

lines.speaker: 段延庆
lines.text: 不必追问来路，先稳住棋势。
lines.textEn: Do not ask where it came from—steady the position first.

lines.text: 旁人听不见传音，虚竹只觉有高人暗中相助。
lines.textEn: Others hear nothing; Xu Zhu senses a master’s hidden aid.

lines.text: 数着之后，局面忽然大变，段延庆这才明白此局秘奥在于先让白棋自断大块，再由后续妙手翻转。
lines.textEn: After several moves, the position changes drastically. Duan Yanqing realizes the secret: let White cut off a large group, then reverse with later finesse.

lines.text: 棋中本有反扑、倒脱靴等弃子之法，但常理只舍少数子力，从未有人敢一口气送出数十子。
lines.textEn: Go has sacrifices like counterattacks and shedding a shoe, yet normally only a few stones are given—no one dares to sacrifice dozens at once.

lines.text: 这等“挤死自己”的奇变，几乎不在高手常识之内；人皆求生脱困，少有人肯先走入绝路。
lines.textEn: Such a strange “self-squeeze” lies beyond common mastery. All seek survival; few choose the dead end first.

lines.text: 若非虚竹闭目误落此手，这一局恐怕再久也无人能解。
lines.textEn: Had Xu Zhu not played blindly, this puzzle might never have been solved.

lines.text: 珍珑局破，石室幽深处传来低沉回应。
lines.textEn: With the Zhenlong Puzzle solved, a low voice echoes from the stone chamber.

lines.speaker: 无崖子
lines.text: 破局者可入，传我真意。
lines.textEn: Let the solver enter and receive my true intent.

lines.speaker: 虚竹
lines.text: 弟子惶恐，只是误打误撞。
lines.textEn: I am humbled. It was sheer chance.

lines.text: 无崖子以真气相引，传功入脉，虚竹周身气息顿变。
lines.textEn: Wuyazi guides true qi into his meridians; Xu Zhu’s aura changes instantly.

lines.speaker: 无崖子
lines.text: 不执胜负，方得逍遥。
lines.textEn: Let go of victory and defeat to gain freedom.

lines.speaker: 苏星河
lines.text: 师命已成，珍珑局今日终解。
lines.textEn: The master’s will is fulfilled; the Zhenlong Puzzle is solved today.

items.name: 清心丸
items.description: 平复心绪，减少内力消耗。
items.descriptionEn: Calms the mind and reduces inner power use.

items.name: 珍珑札记
items.description: 记录破局思路，提升战斗经验收益。
items.descriptionEn: Notes on solving the puzzle; increases battle EXP gains.
